session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary:
## Summary
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8623
**What was done:** - Consolidated documentation from 4 source PRs (#8592, #8567, #8529, #8513) into a single update - **13 new files** created across architecture, CLI, TUI, CI, testing, pr-operations, planning, config, erk, and sessions categories - **13 existing files** updated with new sections and content corrections - **2 overlap merges** resolved: - `land-learn-integration.md`: Used #8592 as structural base (Skip Guards, Session Discovery Pipeline, Cycle Prevention) and layered #8513's additions (return type docs, Session XML File Returns, File Inventory Logging, TUI Learn Plan Toast) - `keyboard-shortcuts.md`: Applied #8529's `p` shortcut view-aware description update while preserving #8592's Launch Keys section already on master - Skipped items already on master (A1, A2, A6, B2, B4, C2 Launch Keys, C3) - Regenerated all indexes and tripwires via `erk docs sync` (19 files updated, 826 tripwires collected)
**Verification:** - `erk docs check`: PASSED - `make fast-ci`: All tests passed (5529 unit, 136 erk-dev, 115 statusline, 114 erkbot) - No stale references found - All new docs indexed correctly
**Post-land:** Close source PRs #8592, #8567, #8529, #8513 as superseded.
